sections.sectionTitle: Mihingin a Pian' Job Dahin Thum

verses.text: Hih bang teng khit ciangin Job in thugen hong kipan a, mihingin a pian' ni a samsia hi
Tua ciangin Job in
“Ka suah ni, leh ‘Pasal naungek khat kipaii hi,’ a kicih zan beimang hen
Tua ni khimzin' ni suak hen! Vana Pasian in phawkin nei kei hen la, tua ni-in khuavak taang kei hen
Khuaniim, khuamial in khuhcip hen. Tua ni-in meiipi ziing hen la, tua ni awk in valhtum hen
“Tua zan, khuamial sahpi in mancip hen! Kum khat sunga nidangte tawh kisim khawm kei hen la, kha khat sunga nidangte lakah kiseh khawm kei hen
Tua zanin ta piang kei hen la, lungdam otna awging tua zanin ging nawnkei hen
Phuisamna tawh awle a khiim thei, a mitphial tawh tuipi ganhing a hencip thei mite in tua zan samsia ta hen
Tua ni zingsang aksite mial hen. A vak ngeilo ding khuavak ngak niloh hen la, zingsang phalvak mu ngeikei hen
bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong kipaiina naugil na khakciplo a, kei' muhna panin lungkhamna hong hepkhiatsak lo hi
“Bang hangin a sisa-in suak hoh lo a, bang hangin ka suah phetin si pah hoh lo ka hi hiam
Bang hangin ka nu' khuk tungah hong kitawi se a, ka nu' nawi hong kiteepsak se ahi hiam
Tua hi zenzen kei leh hanah nuamtakin ka lum hithiat khin ding hi. Sihna sungah ihmu-in ka tawlnga khin ding a
inn hoihnono a lam kumpite leh uliante
ngun leh kham tawh a kidim a hau a liante tawh nuamtakin hanah ka tawlnga khinta ding hi
Bang hangin a hun cing lo-a suakte bang, khuavak a mu manloin a si naungekte bangin hong kiseelcip hoh lo ahi hiam
Tua lai-ah migilote in hong sukha nawnlo ding a, a gim mite tawlnga hithiat ding hi
Tua lai-ah galmat salte in nopna ngah ding a, nasem ukpa' awging za nawnlo ding uh hi
Tua lai munah milian mineu omkhawm a, silate nangawn a topa' kiang pan suakta hi
“Bang hangin lungkhamna a thuak mipa, a nuntakna haksa a sa mahmah mipa
sih ding lunggulh ngeungau napi, a si theilo, sum phum zon' sangin sih ding a lim zon'zaw
han sung a tun' ciangin a nuam mahmah, hankhuk a tun' ciangin nuam lua-in a dianggawp mite, khuavak a mu dingin mi-in piang laizang ahi hiam
Bang hangin mailam thu ding a theilopi-in a mot om ding, a kimkotah Pasian in dai a khaknelh mipa, mi-in piang zenzen ahi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh khuisatna, ka annek suak a, ka tauna, luipi ging bang hi
Ka kihtaktak thu ka tungah hong tung ta a, ka laulau thu, ka tuak ta hi
Lungnopna, daitakin omna, ka nei kei hi. Lungkhamna in hong nawk niloh a, tawldam hun ka nei kei hi,”a ci hi.
